tools.name: call_start
tools.description: Place an outbound phone call via AI voice. The assistant will converse with the callee on behalf of the user.

caller_identity_mode.description: Which phone number to use as the caller ID. assistant_number uses the AI assistant's Twilio number; user_number uses the user's verified personal number.

skip_disclosure.description: Skip the disclosure announcement at the start of the call. Set to true when calling someone who already knows who you are (e.g. your guardian, a family member, or a close contact).

tools.name: call_status
tools.description: Check the status of an active or recent phone call

call_session_id.description: Specific call session ID to check. If omitted, checks for an active call in the current conversation.
The call session ID to end
